raw_text: I am writing to complain about my father's stay last week. We waited over five hours in the emergency waiting room and nobody updated us once. The room was not cleaned properly and staff were dismissive when we asked questions. This was a really disappointing experience and I'd like someone to actually follow up with me.

classification.sub_topic: Emergency department wait time, cleanliness, and staff communication
classification.reasoning: This is a multi-faceted patient experience complaint involving wait times, facilities cleanliness, and staff communication during a past emergency department visit, requiring formal follow-up and investigation.

actions.detail: Empathetic acknowledgement drafted for the complainant.
actions.artifact:
Thank you for taking the time to write to us, and please know we are truly sorry to hear about the difficulties your father and your family experienced during his recent visit. A five-hour wait without any updates, concerns about the cleanliness of the environment, and feeling dismissed when you had questions — none of that reflects the standard of care and communication we want every patient and family to receive. We completely understand your frustration, and we are grateful you brought this to our attention.

Your complaint has been escalated to our Patient Liaison Office, and a member of that team will be in touch with you directly within the next two hours to discuss your concerns and ensure you receive a proper follow-up.

Thank you again for speaking up. Your feedback genuinely matters to us.

actions.detail: Escalated to Patient Liaison Office senior handler — notification issued.
actions.artifact:
[ESCALATION NOTICE → Patient Liaison Office]
Priority: High
Sub-topic: Emergency department wait time, cleanliness, and staff communication
Summary: This is a multi-faceted patient experience complaint involving wait times, facilities cleanliness, and staff communication during a past emergency department visit, requiring formal follow-up and investigation.
